_comment: PM-Tennis breakeven analysis. Derived from fees.json. Sole source of truth for the win-rate threshold in the Section 9.3 primary criterion. Do not modify during an active observation window.

pnl_model.description: Exit-based P&L. Positions are always exited before resolution — either via passive sell at target price or sell-at-market within the 10-minute window. The YES contract never expires worthless in normal operation.
pnl_model.win: Price moves to exit target. Profit = (exit_price - entry_price) * contracts.
pnl_model.loss: Price moves against entry. Operator exits via sell-at-market at a lower price than entry. Loss = (entry_price - sell_at_market_price) * contracts.
pnl_model.note: This is NOT a hold-to-expiry model. A losing trade is an exit at a worse price, not a zero-value expiry.

assumptions.note: Entry at ask on passive fill. Exit target = fair_at_fill * 0.98 per Section 9.2. Loss exit assumes sell-at-market after ~0.05 adverse move within 10-minute window. Blended exit mix assumption: 70% passive fills, 30% sell-at-market.

scenario_A_both_passive.description: Passive entry + passive exit. Both legs earn maker rebate.
scenario_A_both_passive.net_profit_on_win_formula: 0.75 + 0.0948 + 0.0787 = 0.9235 (entry rebate + exit rebate added to gross)

scenario_B_passive_entry_sell_at_market_.description: Passive entry (maker rebate) + sell-at-market exit (taker fee with 50% promo).

blended_70_30_promo.description: 70% passive exit, 30% sell-at-market exit. During promo window. This is the committed scenario.

committed_breakeven_note: Blended exit mix (70% passive / 30% sell-at-market) during promo window. This is the value used in Section 9.3: posterior probability that true win rate exceeds 0.582 must be >= 0.80 for a pass.

sensitivity.note: Breakeven win rate varies with the average price gap on wins and losses. Wider win gaps lower the breakeven; wider loss gaps raise it.

_lock_note: Set locked=true when observation window opens. Any change while locked=true ends the current observation window per Section 9.6.
